steps.title: Determine the percentage per serving
steps.content: One serving provides 180 mg of potassium, and the problem states this is 5% of an adult's daily allowance. Therefore, one serving contributes 5% toward the daily requirement.

steps.title: Scale the percentage for x servings
steps.content: Since one serving provides 5% of the daily allowance, $x$ servings provide: $$p = 5x$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
